rationale: Granular derivatives data (funding rates, open interest) for MORPHO and 30-day cross-asset correlations are not surfaced on Coinglass public pages, CoinGecko free tier, or any other listed free source at sufficient resolution for MORPHO specifically — MORPHO perpetual markets exist on Binance/Bybit but their funding/OI APIs require authenticated or paid endpoints; correlation calculations would require downloading 30 days of OHLCV for MORPHO, BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ and computing Pearson coefficients, which is a derived calculation not published ready-made on any free source.
sources: https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/morpho — price history available but no correlation outputs
https://www.coinglass.com/en/currencies/MORPHO — public page exists but funding rate / OI data not rendered without login as of 2025
https://defillama.com/protocol/morpho — TVL data only, no derivatives metrics
